document.title: Digital Radiography Console Software User Manual feel-DRCS

sourceSummary.oneLine: User manual for feel-DRCS digital radiography console software used to acquire, process, review, store, print, and transmit general radiographic images.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports installation, operation, configuration, DICOM connectivity, optional functions, troubleshooting, and workflow use of the feel-DRCS DR console software.
keyPoints: feel-DRCS acquires images from DR detectors, processes them for clinical application, and provides DICOM services for PACS integration.
The software is intended for radiological doctors and radiological technicians in hospitals for acquired general radiographic images.
The product is described as a medical device that should only be used as digital X-ray radiography console software for X-ray radiography at corresponding hospitals.
The manual specifies workstation, monitor, DICOM MWL, DICOM Storage, DICOM Print, image processing, review, browser, and configuration functions.
Revision history lists Version 0.1 dated 2020-03-12 as Initial Release.

concepts.name: Digital radiography console software
concepts.evidence: feel-DRCS is the DR console or DR control software that acquires image from the DR detector like flat panel or CCD, processes rapidly for clinical application, and provides DICOM services for the integration with PACS system.

concepts.name: Intended use
concepts.evidence: Feel-DRCS is intended to be used for radiological doctor and radiological technician for acquired general radiographic images.

concepts.name: Medical device use limitation
concepts.evidence: This product is a medical device, and it should only be used as digital X-ray radiography console software for X-ray radiography at corresponding hospitals.

concepts.name: DICOM Modality Worklist
concepts.evidence: Through DICOM Worklist, you can input the patient information, integrated with hospital information system (HIS) or input the patient information manually.

concepts.name: DICOM Storage
concepts.evidence: This is to set the server’s environments for DICOM transmission.

concepts.name: DICOM Print
concepts.evidence: You can set the server’s environment for DICOM Print.

concepts.name: PACS integration
concepts.evidence: provides DICOM services for the integration with PACS system

concepts.name: Image processing parameters
concepts.evidence: You can save parameter files for image processing.

concepts.name: Length calibration
concepts.evidence: This is for setting pixel spacing value of the detector at one’s discretion.

concepts.name: Stitching
concepts.evidence: It can create new merged image that do stitch 2- 4 images by method of manual or semi auto.

evidence.claim: The document is a user manual for feel-DRCS digital radiography console software.
evidence.evidenceText: Digital Radiography Console Software User Manual feel-DRCS

evidence.claim: The manual version is 0.1.
evidence.evidenceText: User Manual Version : 0.1

evidence.claim: The document date is 2020-03-12.
Revision history identifies version 0.1 dated 2020-03-12 as Initial Release.
evidence.evidenceText: Version Date Description 0.1 2020-03-12 Initial Release

evidence.claim: feel-DRCS is DR console or DR control software for acquiring detector images, processing them, and providing DICOM services for PACS integration.
evidence.evidenceText: feel-DRCS is the DR console or DR control software that acquires image from the DR detector like flat panel or CCD, processes rapidly for clinical application, and provides DICOM services for the integration with PACS system.

evidence.claim: H&abyz CO.,LTD. is identified in the manual with a Republic of Korea address.
evidence.evidenceText: H&abyz CO.,LTD. 1F, 2-dong, 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-myeon, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea www.abyzr.com

evidence.claim: feel-DRCS is intended for radiological doctors and radiological technicians for acquired general radiographic images.
evidence.evidenceText: Feel-DRCS is intended to be used for radiological doctor and radiological technician for acquired general radiographic images.

evidence.claim: The manual states the system is used in hospitals by radiological doctors or radiological technicians.
evidence.evidenceText: So, it’s used by radiological doctor or radiological technician in hospital.

evidence.claim: The system is to be installed only by an X-ray engineer or X-ray installation engineer.
evidence.evidenceText: So, this system is installed by only X-ray engineer or X-ray installation engineer.

evidence.claim: Only legally qualified persons should use the product after familiarizing themselves with the user manual.
evidence.evidenceText: For proper usage and safety purposes, please ensure that only legally qualified person (Doctor, Medical Treatment Radiological Technologist, Medical Treatment X-RAY Technologist) can use this product after fully familiarize with contents of user manual

evidence.claim: The product cannot be used alone and needs connection with an X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: This medical device can’t use alone. So this product need to connect with X-ray detector.

evidence.claim: The product is a medical device limited to digital X-ray radiography console software use in corresponding hospitals.
evidence.evidenceText: This product is a medical device, and it should only be used as digital X-ray radiography console software for X-ray radiography at corresponding hospitals.

evidence.claim: The workstation requirements include Intel Core i3 or later, 4GB RAM, at least 100GB hard disk, Ethernet, Windows 7 Professional SP1 or Windows 10, and required I/O ports.
evidence.evidenceText: Processor: Intel Core i3 or later(recommend : i5 or more) RAM : 4GB RAM(Recommend 8GB) HDD: At least 100GB hard disk... Operating System : Windows 7 prof.(at least SP1), Windows 10 Need I/O : 1 Parallel port... 1 Serial port... 1 USB port

evidence.claim: Through DICOM Worklist, users can input patient information integrated with HIS or manually.
evidence.evidenceText: Through DICOM Worklist, you can input the patient information, integrated with hospital information system (HIS) or input the patient information manually.

evidence.claim: The Browser mode can review saved image data, query, repeat X-ray, change image sequence, send to PACS, backup, and restore.
evidence.evidenceText: The browser mode works as database viewer in order to review saved image data. In this mode, you can query in various ways, x-ray again, and change the sequence of the image. You can also send to PACS or backup and restore.

evidence.claim: The Review mode supports exposure workflow, review, and image editing.
evidence.evidenceText: Under the REVIEW mode, you can use the EXPOSURE screen for examining in the worklist and also REVIEW mode for checking and editing images in the browser.

evidence.claim: The software can configure DICOM Modality Worklist server settings including AE Title, IP, and Port.
evidence.evidenceText: You can set the server’s environment and client’s environment for using DICOM Modality Worklist service. Server You can set the server’s environment, providing DICOM Modality Worklist service. AE Title IP Port

evidence.claim: The software can configure DICOM Storage server environments for DICOM transmission.
evidence.evidenceText: This is to set the server’s environments for DICOM transmission.

evidence.claim: The software can configure DICOM Print server environments.
evidence.evidenceText: You can set the server’s environment for DICOM Print.

evidence.claim: Optional Viewsub software is synchronized with feel-DRCS and can preview images after X-ray exposure and control a connected X-ray generator on another touch monitor.
evidence.evidenceText: The viewsub is synchronized with main console software(feelDRCS). And the viewsub can see the preview image after X-ray exposure and control a connected X-ray generator on the other touch monitor.

evidence.claim: Optional feelVIEW software is for detailed viewing on a medical or high-resolution monitor and must be installed on the same PC as feelDRCS console software.
evidence.evidenceText: feelVIEW is the software for detail viewing on the medical or high resolution monitor. As installation of feelVIEW, you must be install in same PC of feelDRCS console software.

evidence.claim: The DICOM Query and Retrieve SCU function is optional.
evidence.evidenceText: DICOM Query and Retrieve SCU * This DICOM Q/R function is a optional Function.

evidence.claim: The appendix states feel-DRCS adds DICOM Storage Commitment SCU, DICOM Modality Performed Procedure Step SCU, and DICOM Query and Retrieve SCU.
evidence.evidenceText: feel-DRCS add DICOM Service ( DICOM storage commitment SCU, DICOM Modality Performed Procedure Step SCU, DICOM Query and Retrieve SCU ).

reviewFlags.reason: The metadata authoritySignal indicates MFDS/domestic, but the source text does not explicitly identify MFDS, a Korean regulatory authority, approval status, or jurisdiction.
The metadata productSignal is HAD/A/F 1417-1717, but the source text identifies feel-DRCS software and does not mention HAD/A/F 1417-1717 or HAD1717MC(MG).
The source is a user manual and does not provide regulatory certificate number, approval number, license number, or conformity assessment status.
The extracted text contains minor OCR or source text errors such as duplicated words and typographical errors, but main metadata and technical facts are readable.
